category_sources: source_facts.description says findent indents and beautifies Fortran sources and generates dependency information; official RatrabbiT findent page describes Fortran indentation, relabeling, and format conversion.
display_name_sources: Official RatrabbiT findent page and source_facts.name use findent.
docs_sources: Official RatrabbiT site provides findent overview, design/build/usage documentation, and man page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project exposes a Code tab with SVN tree for findent.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official RatrabbiT pages describe Fortran formatting, beautifying, relabeling, format conversion, and dependency generation.
